creator: keichii@iteration.net
text:
1.
ports/chinese/{FreeWnn-server, FreeWnn-lib} are two slave ports
that have no maintainer for the slave ports.  These two ports
have no difference to the ones existing in ports/japanese
other than just renaming Wnn to cWnn.  Most people use
chinese/chinput or xcin*, and the few people who use Wnn
to input Chinese should simply install the port/japanese/*Wnn* stuff.

2.
ports/chinese/CJK would be better named ports/chinese/cjk.

Fix: 

Please remove ports/chinese/FreeWnn-server and FreeWnn-libs
and repo-copy ports/chinese/CJK to ports/chinese/cjk
How-To-Repeat: 
N/A
